en: Wow! I can feel my body changing, all the salt.
ko: 몸이 변하는 게 느껴져, 소금 때문에.
ja: 体が変わっていくのを感じる、塩のせいで。
zhTW: 我能感覺到身體在變化，都是鹽的關係。
vi: Toi cam nhan duoc co the dang thay doi, do muoi.

en: My penis has been turned into a brined Vlasic pickle.
vi: Cai cua toi da bien thanh dua chuot

en: Be honest, am I too white? Yes, right? Too white?
ja: 正直に言って、僕は白すぎる？
zhTW: 老實說，我是不是太白了？
vi: Thanh that ma noi, toi co trang qua khong?

en: Too white. Quick question, are you here with your boyfriend? No.
ja: ちょっと質問、彼氏と一緒に来たの？
zhTW: 快問一下，你跟男朋友一起來的嗎？
vi: Hoi nhanh, ban den voi ban trai a?

en: Okay, you're with me now. Okay. I took off my wedding ring.
ja: よし、今から僕と一緒だよ。
vi: Duoc roi, gio ban o voi toi.

en: They said you can't wear jewelry here, so that means I'm not married while I'm in the Dead Sea.
ko: 그러니까 사해에 있는 동안은 미혼인 셈이지.
ja: つまり死海にいる間は独身ってこと。
zhTW: 所以我在死海裡的時候算是未婚的。
vi: Vay la khi o Bien Chet toi khong co vo.

en: Why are you covered in this mud? You take mud from the Dead Sea, and it has all those minerals and stuff,
ja: ミネラルがたくさん入ってるんだよ。

en: and you put it all over your body. So you put it all over your body. Yeah, yeah, yeah. Oh!
ko: 그래서 온몸에 바르는 거야? 응, 응.
ja: だから全身に塗るの？うん、うん。
zhTW: 所以你把它塗滿全身？對，對。
vi: Vay ban boi khap nguoi? U, u.

en: Is this attractive? Do I look attractive now? Attractive Israeli man?
ja: 今の僕、魅力的に見える？
zhTW: 我現在看起來有吸引力嗎？
vi: Bay gio toi trong hap dan khong?

en: More attractive than without the mud.
ja: 塗ってない時より魅力的だよ。
zhTW: 比沒塗的時候更有吸引力。
vi: Hap dan hon luc khong boi.

en: I'm telling you the truth. I know. So you think I'm more attractive covered in mud
ja: つまり泥まみれの僕のほうが神様が作った僕より魅力的だと。
zhTW: 所以你覺得我全身泥巴比上帝造出來的樣子更有吸引力。
vi: Vay ban nghi toi phu day bun hap dan hon khi Chua tao ra toi.

en: than as God made me. I'm gonna go that way, and I'm going to cry.
